use_codes.desc: TO REDUCE BLOOD PHENYLALANINE LEVELS IN PATIENTS WITH HYPERPHENYLALANINEMIA DUE TO TETRA HYDROBIOPTERIN RESPONSIVE PHENYLKETONURIA. KUVAN SHOULD BE TAKEN ORALLY WITH FOOD TO INCREASE ABSORPTION
